name: Maria Santos
text: This app saved my vacation! I was so lost trying to figure out the jeepney routes, but BaguioStride made it so easy. The AI chatbot understood exactly what I needed.

name: John Chen
text: As someone who doesn't speak Tagalog, this app was a lifesaver. The voice search worked perfectly, and I never got lost once during my week in Baguio.

name: Ana Dela Cruz
text: I've been using this daily for my commute. The real-time GPS and fare calculator help me plan my trips perfectly. Highly recommend!

name: Robert Kim
text: The step-by-step guidance is incredibly detailed. Even as a first-time visitor, I felt like a local navigating the city. Great app!

name: Lisa Garcia
text: Traveling with kids, we needed reliable navigation. BaguioStride made our family trip stress-free. The smart recommendations helped us discover amazing places too!

name: Michael Tan
text: Time is money, and this app saved me hours. The route suggestions are always accurate, and I love the fare calculator feature.
